# Data Source: okta_security_events_providers

Get a list of security events providers from Okta.

## Schema

### Read-Only

- `security_events_providers` (List of Object) The list of security events providers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_events_providers))

<a id="nestedatt--security_events_providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_events_providers`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `settings` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--security_events_providers--settings))
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--security_events_providers--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_events_providers.settings`

Read-Only:

- `issuer` (String)
- `jwks_url` (String)
- `well_known_url` (String)
